name: qlogicae-cor1
author: Vaughn Cedric L. Araneta
description: The core library for the QLogicae framework

scripts.clean:all: bun run clean:build && bun run clean:reports
scripts.build:pre: bun run clean:build && bun run format && bun run lint
scripts.build: bun run build:pre && bun run transpile && bun run bundle && bun run build:post
scripts.test:all: bun run test:unit && bun run test:benchmark
scripts.deploy:push: git push origin && git push origin "typescript-v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")"
scripts.deploy:commit: git add . && git commit -m 'deployment attempt' || true
scripts.workflow:test: bun run build && bun run test
scripts.workflow:test:unit: bun run build && bun run test:unit
scripts.workflow:test:benchmark: bun run build && bun run test:benchmark
scripts.workflow:deploy: bun run workflow:deploy:pre && bun run deploy:commit && bun run deploy:tag && bun run workflow:deploy:post
scripts.workflow:deploy:post: (bun run deploy:publish) || (bun run login && bun run deploy:publish)
